Bindings.Binding: HeroHelper.chardb.settings.button.locked = not HeroHelper.chardb.settings.button.locked if HeroHelper.ReminderButton and HeroHelper.ReminderButton.ApplyLock then HeroHelper.ReminderButton:ApplyLock() end
if HeroHelper.ReminderButton and HeroHelper.ReminderButton.TestShow then HeroHelper.ReminderButton:TestShow() end
